programming: Onboard: cycle ignition OFF-RUN 8x ending in RUN, press any remote button; locks cycle to confirm. Professional tool required if <2 existing keys.
notes: 4D63 80-bit. ILCO blade H92-PT uses H75 keyway profile (H92-PT is the transponder-key part number, not a different keyway). CWTWB1U331 is OEM FCC for 2004-2006 F-150 (oemcarkeymall confirmed per year); CWTWB1U793 takes over ~2007-2010; 2011+ row separately listed. This row covers 2004-2006 OEM accurately; 2007-2010 also accepts CWTWB1U793 as cross-compatible replacement.

programming: Onboard if 2 existing keys available: OFF-RUN 8x, press remote button. Otherwise dealer/locksmith with IDS.
No onboard programming. Requires professional diagnostic tool (IDS/FDRS or Autel/Snap-on).
notes: Smart key (push-button start) on XLT+ trims; flip key on lower/commercial trims. 2015-2017 smart key uses 902 MHz M3N-A2C31243300 (164-R8117). Confirmed 902 MHz via uhs-hardware.com and locksmithkeyless.com.

programming: No onboard programming. Requires IDS/FDRS or equivalent professional tool.
notes: 2018-2022 smart uses M3N-A2C93142600 (164-R8166) at 902 MHz. Flip key N5F-A08TAA on base/work trims.

programming: No onboard programming. Requires IDS/FDRS or equivalent professional tool.
notes: Lightning EV (2022-2024) shares same key platform. Transponder 164-R8289 covers base keyed-ignition variants.

programming: Onboard if 2 existing keys: OFF-RUN 8x, press remote button. Else locksmith/dealer.
notes: Super Duty shares key platform with F-150 of same generation. ILCO blade H92-PT (H75 keyway profile) — H92-PT is the transponder-key part number for 2004+ Ford.

programming: Onboard if 2 existing keys. Otherwise IDS/FDRS required.
notes: Transpondery lists F-250 2011-2016 as Texas Crypto 2 / Tiris DST80 generation.

programming: No onboard programming. Requires IDS/FDRS or Autel/Snap-on.
notes: Transpondery confirms F-250 2017+ uses Philips Crypto 3 / HiTAG Pro. Smart trim uses M3N-A2C93142600.

programming: Onboard if 2 existing keys available.
notes: Last year of US Ranger before 2019 relaunch. Transpondery: Ranger 2011+ Texas Crypto 2/Tiris DST80.

programming: No onboard programming. Professional tool required.
notes: Ranger returned to US market for 2019 MY. Flip key covers base/XL; smart key on XLT/Lariat. 2024 programming confirmed professional-only.

programming: No onboard programming. Professional tool required.
notes: New nameplate 2022. XL/XLT work trims may use keyed ignition with transponder; Lariat uses smart key. Smart key FCC M3N-A2C931426 / 164-R8182 confirmed 902 MHz.

programming: No onboard programming. PEPS requires professional IDS/FDRS or Autel.
notes: Returned 2021. Two smart key FCC IDs depending on trim/remote-start option. 315 MHz (M3N-A2C931423/164-R8287) for base PEPS; 902 MHz (M3N-A2C931426/164-R8288) for remote-start equipped. Part number corrected from 164-R8297 to 164-R8288 per locksmithkeyless.com OEM listing.

programming: No onboard programming. Professional IDS/FDRS or Autel required.
notes: Distinct from full Bronco; smaller unibody crossover. Smart key 164-R8288 confirmed via remotesandkeys.com.

programming: Onboard if 2 existing keys.
notes: Transpondery: Escape 2005-2012 Texas Crypto 4D63/ID63. CWTWB1U793 confirmed for this generation.

programming: OUCD6000022: onboard capable (some trims). H128-PT: requires professional tool.
notes: New HU101 high-security blade introduced 2013. Non-proximity trims use remote head key (OUCD6000022/164-R8046, 315 MHz, 4D63); push-button start trims use smart key. Chip confirmed Texas 4D63 for remote head key via uhs-hardware.com and locksmithkeyless.com.

programming: Smart (push-button): no onboard programming, requires professional IDS/FDRS or Autel. Flip (keyed ignition): professional tool required.
notes: Redesigned Escape 2020. S base trim has keyed ignition (Keyless Start: Not Available per carbuzz.com specs) and uses flip key N5F-A08TAA (164-R8269); SE/SEL/Titanium trims have Intelligent Access push-button start and use smart key M3N-A2C931426 (164-R8198). Carbuzz 2020 Escape S specs and edmunds trim comparison both confirm push-button start not standard on S. Flip key confirmed on locksmithkeyless.com 2020 Escape listing.

programming: Onboard if 2 existing keys.
notes: Transpondery: Explorer 2004-2012 Texas 4D63/ID63.

programming: CWTWB1U793: onboard capable. M3N5WY8609: professional tool required.
notes: Explorer 2011+ gen introduced smart PEPS option. M3N5WY8609 uses PCF7945A/PCF7953A ID46 chip at 315 MHz with H75 blade — confirmed via abkeys.com and locksmithkeyless.com.

programming: Smart (push-button): no onboard programming, professional IDS/FDRS or Autel. Flip (keyed ignition): onboard if 2 existing keys.
notes: Explorer switched to HiTAG Pro / HU101 blade 2016. Transpondery: Explorer 2016+ Philips Crypto 3. Smart key (M3N-A2C31243300) on XLT+ push-button-start trims; flip key (N5F-A08TAA/164-R8130) on base trim with keyed ignition. Forum posts confirm base Explorer 2016 had keyed ignition while XLT and above had push-button start. Flip key confirmed on locksmithkeyless.com and northcoastkeyless.com for 2016-2022 Explorer.

programming: Smart (push-button): no onboard programming, requires IDS/FDRS or Autel. Flip (keyed ignition): professional tool required.
notes: Redesigned 2020; key spec unchanged 2018-2024. FCC corrected from M3N-A2C93142600 to M3N-A2C931426 — the OEM-stamped FCC on 164-R8198 is M3N-A2C931426 (confirmed bestkeysolution, northcoastkeyless, remotesandkeys). M3N-A2C93142600 is the long-form variant used on F-series trucks (164-R8166). Flip key N5F-A08TAA (164-R8269) confirmed for 2018-2022 Explorer base trim with keyed ignition on locksmithkeyless.com (2018, 2019, 2020 Explorer listings).

programming: Onboard if 2 existing keys.
notes: Transpondery: Edge 2006-2010 Texas 4D63.

programming: CWTWB1U793: onboard capable. M3N5WY8609: professional tool.
notes: Transpondery: Edge 2010-2014 Tiris DST80 generation. Smart key option on Titanium/Sport trims. M3N5WY8609 uses PCF7945A/ID46 at 315 MHz with H75 blade.

programming: No onboard programming. Professional tool required.
notes: Transpondery: Edge 2014+ Philips Crypto 3 / HiTAG Pro.

programming: No onboard programming. IDS/FDRS or Autel required.
notes: Edge discontinued after 2022 MY in US. Part numbers vary by trim: 164-R8149/164-R8182/164-R8244.

programming: Onboard if 2 existing keys.
notes: Transpondery: Expedition 2006-2010 Texas 4D63.

programming: CWTWB1U793: onboard capable. M3N5WY8609: professional tool.
notes: Transpondery: Expedition 2011-2017 Texas Crypto 2/Tiris DST80. Expedition Limited/Platinum may have PEPS.

programming: Smart (push-button PEPS): no onboard programming, IDS/FDRS or Autel required. Flip (keyed ignition): professional tool required.
notes: Transpondery: Expedition 2018+ Philips Crypto 3/HiTAG Pro. FCC corrected from M3N-A2C93142600 to M3N-A2C931426 — OEM-stamped FCC on 164-R8198 confirmed via northcoastkeyless and bestkeysolution Expedition listings. Flip key N5F-A08TAA (164-R8269) on XLT base without 202A PEPS package (keyed ignition); smart key M3N-A2C931426 on XLT with PEPS option and Limited/Platinum. auto123.com specs confirm PEPS is optional on XLT. Flip key confirmed on locksmithkeyless.com 2019 Expedition listing.

programming: No onboard programming. Professional tool required.
notes: EcoSport entered US market 2018. Smart key FCC M3N-A2C93142300 confirmed 315 MHz / 164-R8163 via locksmithkeyless.com and carandtruckremotes.com.

programming: RemoteHead (OUCD6000022): onboard capable on some trims. Smart (KR55WK48801): professional tool required.
notes: Transpondery: Focus 2011-2015 Texas Crypto 2/Tiris DST80. HU101 blade introduced on Focus 2011. Remote head key (OUCD6000022) on S/SE/SEL 2011-2014 (keyed ignition). Smart PEPS key (KR55WK48801, 434 MHz, 164-R8048) on Titanium 2012-2014 with automatic transmission push-button start. Two sources confirm KR55WK48801 covers 2012-2018 Focus Titanium: locksmithkeyless.com and uhs-hardware.com (PEPS-designated listing).

programming: OUCD6000022: onboard capable. M3N5WY8609: professional tool.
notes: Focus smart key (Titanium/push-button-start trims) uses M3N5WY8609 with H75 blade / PCF7945A ID46 chip at 315 MHz — NOT HU101/ID49 as previously listed. Corrected via locksmithkeyless.com and abkeys.com cross-reference.

programming: Onboard if 2 existing keys.
notes: Transpondery: Fusion 2006-2010 Texas 4D63.

programming: Onboard if 2 existing keys.
notes: CWTWB1U793 confirmed for Fusion 2011-2012 via locksmithkeyless and bestkeysolution.

programming: Smart key: professional only. Remote head: onboard if 2 existing keys.
notes: Redesigned 2013 Fusion. Smart key (push-button) on Titanium/Energi; remote head on SE/SE Luxury.

programming: No onboard programming. IDS/FDRS or Autel required.
notes: Fusion discontinued after 2020 MY in US. Transpondery: Fusion 2017-2020 Philips Crypto 3. Part number corrected from 164-R8166 (that is the F-Series truck part) to 164-R8149 (Fusion/Mustang/Edge), confirmed locksmithkeyless.com and oemcarkeymall.

programming: Onboard if 2 existing keys.
notes: Transpondery: Mustang 2005-2012 Texas 4D63.

programming: Onboard if 2 existing keys.
notes: Transpondery: Mustang 2011-2014 Texas Crypto 2/Tiris DST80.

programming: No onboard programming. Professional tool required.
notes: S550 generation 2015+. Transpondery: Mustang 2015+ Philips Crypto 3/HiTAG Pro.

programming: No onboard programming. Professional tool required.
notes: Refresh generation 2018-2021. Part number corrected from 164-R8166 (F-series truck part) to 164-R8149 (Mustang/Fusion/Edge). Both use M3N-A2C93142600 FCC ID but different OEM part numbers.

programming: No onboard programming. IDS/FDRS or Autel required.
notes: S650 Mustang 2022+. New FCC ID M3N-A3C054339 (164-R8324) confirmed via uhs-hardware.com and locksmithkeyless.com.

programming: Onboard capable on some configurations.
notes: North American Transit launched 2015 MY. Transpondery: Transit 2013-2016 Tiris DST80; 2016+ HiTAG Pro.

programming: No onboard programming. Professional tool required.
notes: Transit van 2019+ uses flip key N5F-A08TAA (164-R8281). 2020-2024 Transit Econoline uses transponder 164-R8289.

programming: Professional programming required.
notes: Transit Connect uses Tibbe blade (FO21T) in this generation. Remote head key FCC KR55WK47899 / part 164-R8042 confirmed at 315 MHz via uhs-hardware.com. Standalone transponder-only key (no remote) is 164-R8051.

programming: Onboard capable some trims.
notes: New generation Transit Connect 2014 adopted HU101 blade.

programming: No onboard programming. Professional tool required.
notes: Transit Connect discontinued in US after 2023 MY. FCC N5F-A08TAA (164-R8236) confirmed via Amazon listings.

programming: Onboard if 2 existing keys.
notes: Transpondery: Navigator 2002-2009 Texas 4D63. ILCO blade H92-PT (H75 keyway profile).

programming: Onboard if 2 existing keys.
notes: Transpondery: Navigator 2010-2013 Texas Crypto 4D DST80. ILCO blade H92-PT (H75 keyway profile).

programming: No onboard programming. Professional tool required.
notes: Transpondery: Navigator 2013-2017 Hitag 2+/ID46. M3N5WY8609 also used on MKS/MKT/MKX 2013-2015.

programming: No onboard programming. IDS/FDRS or Autel required.
notes: Redesigned 2018 Navigator. FCC M3N-A2C940780 / part 164-R8226 confirmed for 2018-2021 via uhs-hardware.com. Split from 2022+ row which uses M3N-A2C931426 / 164-R8278.

programming: No onboard programming. IDS/FDRS or Autel required.
notes: 2022+ Navigator updated to FCC M3N-A2C931426 / part 164-R8278 (shared with Aviator/Corsair/Nautilus). Confirmed via bestkeysolution.com OEM listing.

programming: Onboard if 2 existing keys.
notes: Transpondery: MKZ 2007-2009 Texas 4D63. ILCO blade H92-PT (H75 keyway profile).

programming: Professional tool required.
notes: Transpondery: MKZ 2010-2012 Texas Crypto 4D DST80.

programming: No onboard programming. IDS/FDRS or Autel required.
notes: Transpondery: MKZ 2013-2016 HiTAG Pro 128-bit. Part number corrected from 164-R8117 (that is the Ford F-150 2015-2017 part) to 164-R7991, confirmed via locksmithkeyless.com and oemcarkeymall MKZ-specific listings.

programming: No onboard programming. IDS/FDRS or Autel required.
notes: Transpondery: MKZ 2017+ HiTAG Pro. Discontinued after 2020 MY. Part number corrected from 164-R8278 (wrong — that is Navigator/Aviator) to 164-R8154 (5-button) / 164-R8155 (4-button). FCC M3N-A2C94078000 confirmed via northcoastkeyless.com and uhs-hardware.com.

programming: No onboard programming. IDS/FDRS or Autel required.
notes: Reintroduced Aviator as 2020 MY. FCC M3N-A2C931426 / part 164-R8279 confirmed via northcoastkeyless.com for 4-button variant.

programming: No onboard programming. IDS/FDRS or Autel required.
notes: Replaced MKC 2020. Part 164-R8278 confirmed via uhs-hardware.com. Shares key with Aviator/Nautilus.
